highestROIMission.title: Prediction Ledger + Simulation Ranking
highestROIMission.objective: Turn CYVX intelligence into a recurring flywheel: reality acquisition, prediction, economic ranking, mission generation, outcome capture, trust calibration, learning, and self-improvement.
highestROIMission.top_constraint: Outcome capture exists, but CYVX needs repeated outcome volume to calibrate trust.
highestROIMission.expected_outcome: CYVX produces ranked predictions, simulated mission choices, and measurable expected-vs-actual records for each mission.
highestROIMission.next_best_action: Build Prediction Ledger + Simulation Ranking as the next durable intelligence layer.
